title: Path和Files读写文件
java反射
Linux下常用软件工具环境的安装(CentOS Linux 7)
content:
MariaDB## 在 /etc/yum.repos.d/ 下创建 MariaDB.repo 文件，写入如下内容vim /etc/yum.repos.d/MariaDB.repo    # MariaDB 10.4 CentOS repository list - created 2019-11-05 11:56 UTC    # http://downloads.mariadb.org/mariadb/repositories/    [mariadb]    name = MariaDB    baseurl = http://yum.mariadb.org/10.4/centos7-amd64    gpgkey=https://yum.mariadb.org/RPM-GPG-KEY-MariaDB    gpgcheck=1## 安装yum -y install MariaDB-client MariaDB-server## 设置开机自启systemctl enable mariadb## 启动服务systemctl start mariadb

Node.jscd /usr/local/sbin/wget -O node-v12.18.4.tar.xz -vc https://nodejs.org/dist/v12.18.4/node-v12.18.4-linux-x64.tar.xzxz -df node-v12.18.4.tar.xztar -xf node-v12.18.4.tarrm -rf node-v12.18.4.tar cd node-v12.18.4-linux-x64/## 建立软链接ln -s /usr/local/sbin/node-v12.18.4-linux-x64/bin/node /usr/local/bin/nodeln -s /usr/local/sbin/node-v12.18.4-linux-x64/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npmln -s /usr/local/sbin/node-v12.18.4-linux-x64/bin/npx /usr/local/bin/npx## 安装hexonpm insatll hexo

xzcd /usr/local/sbin/wget -vc https://tukaani.org/xz/xz-5.2.5.tar.gztar -xzf xz-5.2.5.tar.gzrm -rf xz-5.2.5.tar.gz cd xz-5.2.5/./configuremake && make install

Gityum insatll -y git-core

rediscd /usr/local/sbin/wget -vc http://download.redis.io/releases/redis/redis-3.2.4.tar.gztar -zxf redis-3.2.4.tar.gzrm -rf redis-3.2.4.tar.gzcd redis-3.2.4make && make install## 启动服务redis-server## 启动命令行redis-cli

title: 二分查找
content:
算法是一种思想！
/** * @param array 有序数组 * @param key 要查找的关键字 * @return 关键字在数组的下标 * */public static int search(int[] array, int key) {    int low = 0;    int high = array.length - 1;    int mid = 0;    while (low <= high) {        mid = (low + high) / 2;        if (array[mid] == key) {            return mid;        } else if (array[mid] < key) {            low = mid + 1;        } else {            high = mid - 1;        }    }    return -1;}

title: 冒泡排序
content:
算法是一种思想！
public static void sort(int[] val) {    for (int i = 0; i < val.length - 1; i++) {        //判断是否需要继续冒泡        boolean flag = false;        for (int j = val.length - 1; j >= i + 1; j--) {            if (val[j] < val[j - 1]) {                int temp = val[j];                val[j] = val[j - 1];                val[j - 1] = temp;                flag = true;            }        }        if (flag == false) {            return;        }    }        return;}

title: 利用LocalDate编写一个日历程序
content: import java.time.LocalDate;import java.util.Scanner;/** * @author ccying * @date 2018/8/25 */public class Calender {    public static void main(String[] args) {        System.out.print("输入时间，格式为yyyy/MM/dd：");        String date = new Scanner(System.in).nextLine();        String[] dates = date.split("/");        int year = Integer.parseInt(dates[0]);        int month = Integer.parseInt(dates[1]);        int today = Integer.parseInt(dates[2]);        LocalDate localDate = LocalDate.of(year, month, 1);        int week = localDate.getDayOfWeek().getValue();        System.out.println("Mon\tTue\tWed\tThu\tFir\tSta\tSun");        for (int i = 0; i < week - 1; i++) {            System.out.print(" \t");        }        while (localDate.getMonthValue() == month) {            System.out.printf("%2d",localDate.getDayOfMonth());            if (localDate.getDayOfMonth() == today) {                System.out.print("*\t");            } else {                System.out.print(" \t");            }            if (localDate.getDayOfWeek().getValue() == 7) {                System.out.println();            }            localDate = localDate.plusDays(1);        }    }}

title: 利用可变参数关闭IO资源
content: package com.ccying.java.io;import java.io.Closeable;import java.io.IOException;/** * @author ccying * @date 2018/8/25 */public class Closed {    public static void close(Closeable... closeables) {        for (int i = 0; i < closeables.length; i++) {            try {                closeables[i].close();            } catch (IOException e) {                e.printStackTrace();            }        }    }}

title: 堆排序
content:
算法是一种思想！
#include<stdio.h>//堆的大小 int n;//堆 int heap[10];//交换函数 void swap(int x, int y); //建最大堆函数void create();//向下调整堆函数void siftdown(int index);//升序函数void sort();  int main() {    //输入10个数，存储在heap中，对数据排序    int num = 10;    n = num;         for (int i = 0; i < num; i++)      {        scanf("%d", &heap[i]);    }        create();    sort();        //测试    for (int i = 0; i < num; i++)      {        printf("%d ", heap[i]);    }        return 0;}void swap(int x, int y) {    int temp = heap[x];    heap[x] = heap[y];    heap[y] = temp;    return;}void create() {    //线性数组表示完全二叉树时,数组下标从0开始    //若有n个结点，下标分别为0-(n-1)    //则其有非叶子结点n/2个，叶子结点(n + 1)/2     //x.left=2*x+1, x.right= 2*x+2    for (int i = n / 2 - 1; i >= 0; i--)    {        siftdown(i);    }    return;}void siftdown(int index){    int maxI;         //当index有左孩子，并且需要调整    while (2 * index + 1 <= n - 1)    {         if (heap[index] < heap[2 * index + 1])        {            //左孩子值比index结点值大             maxI = 2 * index + 1;        }        else         {            maxI = index;        }                //当index有右孩子        if (2 * index + 2 <= n - 1)        {            //如果右孩子值更大            if (heap[maxI] < heap[2 * index + 2])            {                maxI = 2 * index + 2;            }        }                if (index != maxI)        {            //如果存在孩子值比index值大            swap(index, maxI);            index = maxI;        }        else        {            //不需要继续向下调整             return;        }    }    return; }void sort(){    while (n > 1)    {         swap(0, n - 1);        n--;        siftdown(0);    }    return;}

title: 快速排序
content:
算法是一种思想！
/** * 快速排序 * */public static void sort(int[] val) {    sortHandler(val, 0, val.length -1);}/** * @param val 要排序数组 * @param leftIndex 左指针 * @param rightIndex 右指针 * */private static void sortHandler(int[] val, int leftIndex, int rightIndex) {        int left = leftIndex;        int right = rightIndex;        int midVal = val[leftIndex];        while (left < right) {            while (left < right && val[right] > midVal) {                right--;            }            val[left] = val[right];            while (left < right && val[left] < midVal) {                left++;            }            val[right] = val[left];            if (left == right) {                val[left] = midVal;            }        }        if (leftIndex < left - 1) {            sortHandler(val, leftIndex, left - 1);        }        if (rightIndex > right + 1) {            sortHandler(val, right + 1, rightIndex);        }    }

title: 插入排序
content:
算法是一种思想！
public static void sort(int[] val) {    for (int i = 1; i < val.length; i++) {        //要插入数据        int insertVal = val[i];        //要插入位置        int insertIndex = i - 1;        while (insertIndex >= 0 && insertVal < val[insertIndex]) {            val[insertIndex + 1] = val[insertIndex];            insertIndex--;        }        val[insertIndex + 1] = insertVal;    }}

title: 简单选择排序
content:
算法是一种思想！
public static void sort(int[] val) {    for (int i = 0; i < val.length - 1; i++) {        //假定最小值下标        int minIndex = i;        for (int j = i + 1; j < val.length; j++) {            if (val[j] < val[minIndex]) {                //更新最小值下标                minIndex = j;            }        }        if (minIndex != i) {            //交换            int temp = val[i];            val[i] = val[minIndex];            val[minIndex] = temp;        }    }}

title: 缩小增量排序
content:
算法是一种思想！
public static void sort(int[] val) {    //划组排序    for (int g = val.length / 2; g > 0; g /= 2) {        //插入排序思想        for (int i = g; i < val.length; i++) {            int insert_val = val[i];            int insert_index = i - g;            while (insert_index >= 0 && insert_val < val[insert_index]) {                val[insert_index + g] = val[insert_index];                insert_index -= g;            }            val[insert_index + g] = insert_val;        }    }}

title: 自定义注解校验密码合法性
